overview.title: Funding & Transfer Hub
overview.subtitle: View balances and move assets directly in the app.
overview.connectTitle: Connect a wallet to start transferring
overview.connectDescription: The connected wallet is used for signatures and transfers.
overview.loadError: Unable to load transfer overview right now.
overview.walletSubtitle: Connected account and current HyperEVM network status.
overview.calloutCoreGasBody: Moving funds from HyperCore to HyperEVM requires HYPE on HyperCore / Spot.
overview.calloutEvmGasBody: Moving funds from HyperEVM back to HyperCore requires HYPE on HyperEVM.
overview.transferCardSubtitle: Choose direction, asset, and amount for your transfer.
overview.awaitingCoreSignature: Confirm the HyperCore transfer signature in your wallet.
overview.awaitingEvmSignature: Confirm the HyperEVM transaction in your wallet.
overview.queuedSuccess: Transfer submitted on HyperCore and queued for the next HyperEVM block.
overview.confirmedSuccess: Transfer confirmed on HyperEVM and forwarded to HyperCore.

history.title: Funding History
history.subtitle: Lightweight funding timeline for detectable in-app actions.
history.connectTitle: Connect a wallet to view funding history
history.connectDescription: History is only shown for the connected wallet.
history.trackingNoteFallback: External handoffs are not fully tracked.
history.emptyDescription: This page only shows lightweight in-app action history.

errors.unsupportedAsset: This asset is not supported for the selected direction yet.
errors.switchToHyperEvm: Switch the connected wallet to HyperEVM to continue.
